pages.text: Fourteen spell slots. The endgame Botany spellbook, forged at the $(thing)Terra Plate$() with 500,000 mana, a Terrasteel Spellbook, a Mana Pearl, a Mana Diamond, and a Gaia Spirit.

pages.title: Stats
pages.text: $(li)+300 Max Mana$(li)+20% Cooldown Reduction$(li)+15% Botany Spell Power$(li)+10% Spell Power (all schools)$(li)+0.15 Mana Efficiency$(br)Mana network capacity: 500,000. Fire-resistant when dropped.
